pages.text: $(bold)Importers$() are input gates placed inside CM dimensions.$(br2)They receive resources from PreFab PULL faces and make them available to adjacent machines.$(br2)Think of them as: $(italic)"Where resources from the Overworld enter your factory"$()

pages.title: How Importers Work
pages.text: $(bold)1.$() PreFab inserts items into Importer's buffer$(br2)$(bold)2.$() Importer actively pushes items into adjacent inventories$(br2)$(bold)3.$() Has a 9-slot internal buffer to prevent item loss$(br2)$(italic)Importers push, they don't wait to be pulled from.$()

pages.title: Placing Importers
pages.text: $(bold)Direct connection:$()$(br)[Importer] → [Machine]$(br2)$(bold)Better: Use a chest$(br)[Importer] → [Chest] → [Machine]$(br2)$(italic)Intermediate chests create more reliable, better-behaved systems.$()

pages.title: UUID Linking
pages.text: Each Importer gets a unique UUID when placed.$(br2)This UUID is used to link PreFab faces to specific Importers.$(br2)See $(l:importers_exporters/frequency_system)Frequency System$() for easier identification.
